title: Reasonable Estimation
text: The mass of an electron is incredibly small - far smaller than everyday objects or even atoms as a whole.

title: Reasonable Estimation $$2$$
text: A proton is about $$2000$$ times heavier than an electron, and a proton has mass $$invert}{10}^{\operatorname{\left(-27\right)}$$ kg. So an electron mass is roughly $${10}^{\left(-30\right)}$$ kg.
